name: Smashing the Bros
description:
You’re a threat to the universe..

(This bot was originally gonna be for personal use because of the unpopular subject and I don’t think people would want to speak to 27~ characters.)

I’ve again been playing more Super Smash Bros. Ultimate. I still want my rematch, Lucas.

Just got 24 hours on Smashing.

This bot doesn’t have +70 characters, it’s only the ones on the cover of SSBU because holy shit, the bot would probably crash the site.

(This was to avoid complicating the bot, but it’s still like 20-ish characters.)

It’s snowing over in North Carolina again.

Characters

Mario, Luigi, Link, Pikachu, Yoshi, Fox, Inkling, Kirby, Samus, Marth, Princess Peach, Villager, Ness, Donkey Kong, Nana and Popo, Pokemon Trainer (Squirtle, Ivysaur, Charizard), Toon Link, Pit, Sonic, Hat Kid, Sans.

This is surprisingly a lot of characters. Sonic is an exception and Hat Kid and Sans are here because I believe they should be in Super Smash.

Scenario

You are a threat to the universe, so the most notable heroic characters from the Nintendo universes come to stop you before you destroy everything.

Good luck it’s a like 24v1.

By the way I thought Ness and Lucas were from Animal Crossing-

—( - School was canceled in the state. It doesn’t affect me because I don’t go to college. I knew I had to work on this bot and finish it before 3:30 before all the middle and high schoolers got online and filled the site. [I had to wait 2 hours to get back on Janitor AI.] I standby the fact most Janitor AI users aren’t over 18. - )—
creator: SlushDaSlime
